query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "planbench-xl: evaluating long-horizon planning of llm tool-use agents " computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it measures the same core mechanism (long-horizon reasoning/planning capabilities) and dependent variable (accuracy on complex, multi-step tasks) for the same domain (LLM agents) as the user's question, even though it focuses on Chain-of-Thought reasoning rather than explicit tool-use. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and canonical benchmark for the "long-horizon" aspect of the user's proposed follow-up research.
